These include: 1) aged, 2) disabled, 3) institutional, and 4) new enrollee. CMS further divides some of these segments 
into low income and not low income. As with Part C risk scores, CMS calculates Rx risk scores using FFS claims and MA 
reported diagnosis information to predict expenditures associated with prescription drugs. Additional details are 
available on the CMS website.12,13 
A listing of all variables included in the data file appears in the CCW Data
